creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Understandable.  As for tests, the test suite immediately fails when testing on arm64 FreeBSD 13.2 system:

cd /usr/home/ports/main.ports/databases/py-ormar/work-py39/ormar-0.12.2 && /usr/bin/env PYTHONPATH=/usr/home/ports/main.ports/databases/py-ormar/work-py39/ormar-0.12.2/src /usr/local/bin/python3.9 -m pytest -k '' -rs -v -o addopts=
